title: Simple Improvement Renew
description: Added many practical functions.By making simple modifications (attempting to) make the player's experience completely refreshed.
body:
# Attention
如果你是一名中国玩家，请看[MC百科界面](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/20904.html)获取更多信息。
# Introduction
This mod/datapack has added some small features to make it more convenient for players to play. Functions are as follows:

Granite, andesite, diorite, and mossy cobblestone can be used as cobblestone in most stones;
Sheep will dropped leather;

Wool is disassembled into threads in the crafting table;

Add a multi block structure - Lightning Altar, which can attract lightning to generate lightning coolies faster. The structure has two layers and is 3 * 3 in size. After construction, throw a gold ingot to activate it;

Iron bars can be blasted into blaze rods in blast furnaces;

Vanilla raw meat food is transformed into rotten flesh in a water cauldron, and the water is consumed;

Some friendly creatures with bones and zombie horses drop bones;

Throwing flint and charcoal on a bed can craft gunpowder.

Create debug mode, enter /function sire:debug to display whether config are enabled or disabled in the boss bar.

When triggered raid, it will glow on Calamity villagers within a range of 96 blocks.

Cow killed by Charged creepers now drop the Phantom membrane.
# Instruction related:
**Note: Instructions starting with/sire are only available for Forge 1.14.2-1.16.5**

**displays help**

/sire help

**settings from GUI**

/sire guihelp

/trigger sire_help

**adjusts the switches of various functions**

/sire [creeper|~~creeper method~~|lightning|rotten|gunpowder] [on|off]
# Other

The namespace of our datapack is sire.

This mod's modid is sire.

This mod/datapack is still under development.
